name: black-scholes
when_to_use: 要画期权价随标的价·波动率·到期时间变化的曲线或盈亏图时用它(欧式 Black-Scholes-Merton);目录内所有金融库(financejs/financial/loanjs/tvm-financejs)都不含期权定价。需要 delta/gamma/theta/vega/rho 敏感度另配同作者 greeks 包。
why_valuable: 期权定价依赖累积正态分布 N(d) 的数值近似,AI 徒手实现 d1/d2 与 erf 近似常有系统性误差,定出的价随参数漂移不可信。black-scholes 给出稳定的欧式期权理论价(blackScholes(s,k,t,v,r,callPut)→ 标量),让期权敏感度曲线建立在正确数值上。

data_in.note: 全部是标量参数;t 以年为单位(3 个月=0.25),v 与 r 都用小数(20%=0.2)。callPut 只接受字符串 'call' 或 'put'。

schema.t: number —— 到期时间,单位年(如 0.25 = 三个月)
schema.r: number —— 年化无风险利率,小数

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;纯 JS 数值层。输出单标量价格。
provides.outputs: 欧式期权理论价(标量);配套 stdNormCDF/getW 辅助函数。希腊字母需另配同作者 greeks 包。

api_surface.price: blackScholes(s, k, t, v, r, callPut) → number(期权价)
api_surface.params: s 标的价 · k 行权价 · t 到期年数 · v 波动率(小数) · r 无风险利率(小数) · callPut 'call'|'put'
api_surface.aux: stdNormCDF(x) 标准正态 CDF · getW(...) 内部 omega;delta/gamma/theta/vega/rho 用同作者 greeks 包(npm:greeks)

peer.note: 本条只产单个价格标量:固定其余参数、扫某一维(标的价/波动率/到期日)反复调用得一串价,再交给图表组件画敏感度曲线或盈亏图。

en.when_to_use: Use it to plot option value or profit/loss as the underlying price, volatility, or time to expiry changes (European Black-Scholes-Merton). None of the other finance libraries in the catalog (financejs/financial/loanjs/tvm-financejs) include option pricing. For delta/gamma/theta/vega/rho sensitivities, also use the companion greeks package by the same author.
en.why_valuable: Option pricing depends on a numerical approximation of the cumulative normal distribution N(d). Handwritten AI implementations of d1/d2 and erf approximations often contain systematic errors, making prices drift unreliably with parameters. black-scholes supplies a stable European theoretical price (blackScholes(s,k,t,v,r,callPut) -> scalar), so sensitivity curves rest on correct numbers.

data_in.note: All inputs are scalar parameters. t is measured in years (3 months = 0.25), while v and r are decimals (20% = 0.2). callPut accepts only the string 'call' or 'put'.

schema.t: number -- time to expiry in years (for example, 0.25 = three months)
schema.v: number -- volatility as a decimal (for example, 0.2 = 20%)
schema.r: number -- annualized risk-free rate as a decimal

boot.note: 参数顺序 blackScholes(s,k,t,v,r,callPut):s 标的价、k 行权价、t 到期年数、v 波动率小数、r 无风险利率小数、callPut 'call'|'put'。本包只出价格;delta/gamma/theta/vega/rho 需另引同作者 greeks 包(npm:greeks)。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr black-scholes@1.1.0 +esm + README + source: named export blackScholes (plus default = whole module object, stdNormCDF, getW) — `export{b as blackScholes,c as default,w as getW,S as stdNormCDF}`. Signature blackScholes(s, k, t, v, r, callPut)→Number (README + source line 72): s=underlying price, k=strike, t=years to expiry, v=volatility decimal, r=risk-free decimal, callPut='call'|'put' (source branches on callPut==='call' else put). Zero-dependency. Greeks (delta/gamma/theta/vega/rho) are a separate companion package (greeks / MattL922/greeks), not in this bundle. grep of +esm for document.*/window.*/globalThis.*/appendChild/createElement/addEventListener/localStorage = 0 hits — pure numeric, shadow-safe.
